svg.title: AI coding assistant flow
svg.desc: Flowchart: user, Positron Assistant, GitHub Copilot, Claude/GPT. Accumulating context items shown as coloured stacked boxes.
svg.text: User's computer — code, data and analysis stay here

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user do in this AI coding flow?')
sendPrompt('How does the user accept or reject AI suggestions?')
sendPrompt('Why does the user prompt accumulate in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What are system instructions in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What are available tools in the context window?')
sendPrompt('Why do agent responses accumulate in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What are resources in the context window?')
sendPrompt('Why do tool calls accumulate in the context window?')
sendPrompt('What does GitHub Copilot do as an orchestrator?')
sendPrompt('How does an LLM tokenise and embed a prompt?')

g.text: Runs forward pass through transformer layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate and decode its response?')
